bug.description: configuration mismatch between protocol layers causing inconsistent behavior

prompt:
There is a configuration mismatch between protocol layers causing inconsistent behavior downstream of function init_nr_pdcp_data_ind_queue in the openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/nr_pdcp/nr_pdcp_oai_api.c:314.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
